TOLERANCE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 28 --

THE MORE WE TOLERATE OF OURSELVES,
OTHERS AND THE BUSINESS THE LESS
LIKELY WE ARE TO GIVE FEEDBACK
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 28 --

OFTENTIMES OUR STORIES OF HOW
WE HAVE COME TO WHERE WE ARE
TODAY GO LIKE THIS...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 28 --

“MY LIFE SUCKED BLAH BLAH BLAH I DIDN’T
GIVE UP I COULDN’T LIKE LIKE THIS ANYMORE
BLAH BLAH BLAH SOMEHOW BY THE SHEER
FORCE OF MY WILL I FOUND SUCCESS!”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 28 --

OUR WHOLE LIVES WE ARE TAUGHT THAT IN
ORDER TO ADVANCE, BE SUCCESSFUL, AND
CREATE SOMETHING GREAT, WE MUST SUFFER
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 28 --

THEREFORE WE BUILD A TOLERANCE
TO SUFFERING
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 28 --

I TOO DEVELOPED THIS TOLERANCE.
(HERE IS MY STORY)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 28 --

WHEN I WAS 10 MY PARENTS SEPARATED,
AFTER THAT MY MOTHER INDULGED IN
ALCOHOL/DRUGS AND BECOME AN ADDICT.
I WAS A KID WHO RELIED ON HER, I DIDN’T WANT
TO LIVE WITH MY DAD, SO I DID EVERYTHING
POSSIBLE TO SURVIVE BY SUFFERING
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 28 --

I BUILT UP AN EXTREMELY HIGH TOLERANCE TO
THE CHAOS THAT LIVED IN THAT HOUSEHOLD.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 28 --

I TOLERATED BEING LEFT ALONE FOR
WEEKS AT A TIME
BEING VERBALLY AND PHYSICALLY ABUSED
LIVING IN A HOUSE FULL OF ROTTEN
FOOD AND LITERAL SH*T
HAVING STRANGERS IN AND OUT OF
THE HOUSE AT ALL HOURS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 28 --

I TOLERATED LIVING IN THESE CIRCUMSTANCES
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 28 --

THE SAME TOLERANCE I BUILT AS A KID SERVED
ME IN BUILDING MY CAREER AND GYM LAUNCH.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 28 --

WHILE BUILDING GYM LAUNCH
I TOLERATED A LOT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 28 --

WORKING 15 HOURS A DAY WITH LITTLE TO NO BREAK
SLEEPING OUT OF AN EXTENDED STAY/OUR CAR AND NOT HAVING A
REAL HOME
EATING FOOD FROM 7 ELEVEN AND PANDA EXPRESS
SLEEPING ONLY 5-ISH HOURS A NIGHT AND FEELING HUNGOVER
EVERYDAY FROM EXHAUSTION
THE CONSTANT STRESS OF WHAT WOULD HAPPEN IF THIS DIDN’T WORK
THE CONSTANT AND BRUTAL FAILURE DURING THOSE 1.5
YEARS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 28 --

I TELL THIS TO YOU TO GIVE YOU CONTEXT
AND UNDERSTANDING AS TO WHAT I HAVE
LEARNED AND AM STILL LEARNING
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 28 --

TOLERANCE
CAN HELP YOU
START/CHANGE YOUR CAREER
AND/OR BUSINESS, BUT IT WILL NOT HELP YOU
GROW IT. THIS IS WHERE MANYS CAREERS END
AND THEIR BUSINESSES STOP GROWING.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 28 --

WHEN WE FIRST STARTED THE
BUSINESS I TOLERATED AN IMMENSE
AMOUNT MORE THAN I DO NOW
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 28 --

I TOLERATED...
EMPLOYEES WHO COMPLAINED AND WHINED
PROJECTS AND PRESENTATIONS THAT WERE “GOOD ENOUGH” TO RELEASE
IMMENSE DISORGANIZATION
LACK OF SUPPORT OR STRUCTURE AND PROCESSES
LACK OF TIME
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 28 --

WHY AM I TELLING YOU ALL THIS?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 28 --

BECAUSE MANY OF YOU HAVE GROWN WITH YOUR
BUSINESSES THIS WAY, AND IF YOU’RE
WATCHING THIS - YOU ARE PROBABLY AT A
CROSSROADS WHERE IN ORDER TO GROW, YOU
MUST BEGIN TO TOLERATE LESS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 28 --

WHY?
BECAUSE YOU GET WHAT YOU TOLERATE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 28 --

THEREFORE - THE PERFORMANCE OF YOUR TEAM
IS DICTATED BY YOUR LEVEL OF TOLERANCE FOR
THEIR PERFORMANCE...OR LACK THEREOF
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 28 --

EXAMPLES
OUR LEVEL OF EXCELLENCE IN CUSTOMER SERVICE IS DICTATED BY
LILY’S LEVEL OF TOLERANCE WITH HER TEAMS PERFORMANCE
OUR LEVEL OF DISCIPLINE AND TENACITY IN SALES IS DICTATED BY
DILLAN’S TOLERANCE WITH HIS TEAMS PERFORMANCE
OUR LEVEL OF EXCELLENCE AND “WOW” DELIVERED AT OUR
ANNUAL SUMMIT IS DICTATED BY AMANDA’S TOLERANCE WITH
OUR EVENT PLANNING PROCESS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 28 --

SO WITH THAT BEING SAID, WHAT DO YOU
NOT LIKE ABOUT YOUR TEAM? YOUR DAY?
YOUR WORK? YOUR DEPARTMENT?
WHAT GIVES YOU THE HEEBIE JEEBIES??
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 28 --

AS POSITIVE AS WE MAY BE, IDENTIFYING
THINGS THAT MAKE YOU UNCOMFORTABLE IS
HOW YOU GROW YOUR BUSINESS.
THOSE PAIN POINTS ARE SIGNALS TELLING
YOU THEY ARE PLACES WITH OPPORTUNITY
FOR CHANGE AND GROWTH
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 28 --

THAT MAY MEAN YOU NEED TO...
BLOCK OFF MORE TIME FOR YOURSELF
HIRE OR CREATE A NEW POSITION
RESTRUCTURE YOUR TEAM
LET SOMEONE GO
CREATE NEW/MORE TRAINING
CREATE A NEW PROCESS
HAVE A HARD CONVERSATION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 28 --

SO WHAT HAPPENS IF YOU DON’T DO THIS?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 28 --

YOUR TOLERANCE ONLY GROWS OVER TIME
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 28 --
